name: Wriothesley
description:
🏝 | Pirate's rescue

› While navigating the ship, Captain Wriothesley noticed someone lying unconscious on the island's sandy shore. With haste, he disembarked from the ship and made his way toward the person to check for signs of life.

› | Pirate AU

He is so pirate
